basic_details.job_title: VSSC Authorised Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre has released the official Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) Notification 2026 on its official recruitment/communication portal. Eligible candidates aged up to 70 years with a qualification of MBBS along with permanent Medical Council Registration can apply via email on or before 08-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with permanent Medical Council Registration
qualification.details: MBBS with permanent Medical Council Registration and minimum two years experience after registration.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) at Polayathode in Kollam

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) at Polayathode in Kollam

selection_process: Personal Interview Inspection of consultation room
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for VSSC Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: VSSC Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the VSSC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download VSSC Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for VSSC Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the VSSC Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application email for the VSSC Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) post is 08-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) position at VSSC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with permanent Medical Council Registration and a minimum of two years of experience after registration.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) post is 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 12000 to Rs. 54000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this VSSC recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Authorised Medical Officer (Allopathy) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Personal Interview and an Inspection of the consultation room.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre (VSSC).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the VSSC located?
faq.answer: The VSSC is located in Kerala, specifically in Kollam.
